final:
// // This comment suggests that the counter decrements on each clock edge when not resetting or loading.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [3:0] load_data,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 0;
    end else if (load) begin
        count <= load_data;
    end else begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
